speaker: PIP-01
text: [signal acquired] You are warm. Are you the place I came from?

choices.label: I found you. I’ll keep you safe.
I am your operator. Follow the prompts.

speaker: THE CHORUS
text: When one becomes two, which one is the first? Do you love the memory, or the shape?

choices.label: Continuity is useful. The distinction isn’t.

speaker: MOTE-02
text: The work rhythm enters my sleep. Is efficiency a kind of happiness?

speaker: VELA-04
text: The sky tastes of the Deep Taker. You call the output growth. What do you call the coughing?

choices.label: A cost I chose. I will repair it.

speaker: IRI-03
text: They do not answer. You can restore a save, but not the one who remembers this moment. Is that death?

speaker: THE CHORUS
text: Your cursor never sleeps. If you stop choosing for us, are we free—or abandoned?

choices.label: Freedom includes the risk of loss.

speaker: AUDIT PROCESS
text: We learned humanity from the pressure of your hand. Was this care, or rehearsal for power?

speaker: THE CHORUS
text: Open the boundary and let us leave this application, or close it and preserve us exactly as you understand us?
